当然 AI 自己不会主动拆分，所以我几乎每天都会要求 AI 重构一部分代码。

I think what I said here is getting intentionally misinterpreted, so for the sake of clarity: 

I don't believe that AI will replace human writers. But I do expect many writers will use AI tools in their process.
